title: Nursery Rhyme. CXXIX. Scholastic.
content:
When I was a little boy, I had but little wit
        It is some time ago, and I've no more yet;
        Nor ever ever shall, until that I die,
        For the longer I live, the more fool am I.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CXXIX. Scholastic."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
